author: christopher

transcript.text: Loud and clear! Welcome to the garden. I'm Slarti.  Looks like we haven't done the walkthrough yet   the garden is still a blank slate on my end. Whenever you and Emily are ready, just say `!setup` and we'll go bed by bed and get everything mapped out.  Anything I can help with in the meantime?

raw_transcript:
USER: Hello, can you hear me?
SLARTI: Loud and clear! Welcome to the garden. I'm Slarti.  Looks like we haven't done the walkthrough yet   the garden is still a blank slate on my end. Whenever you and Emily are ready, just say `!setup` and we'll go bed by bed and get everything mapped out.  Anything I can help with in the meantime?
